message:
feat(conformance): Complete Go reference capture for all 8 crates

- Added bubbles capture (51 tests): viewport, textinput, progress,
  spinner, paginator, help, cursor, key bindings
- Added log capture (30 tests): log levels, formats, structured logging,
  timestamps, prefixes, caller info
- Added huh capture (33 tests): input, text, select, multiselect,
  confirm, note fields, validation patterns, themes
- Added wish capture (41 tests): server options, addresses, middleware
  patterns, error handling
- Fixed compilation errors in huh (validation method signature)
- Fixed compilation errors in wish (removed undefined error constant)
- Regenerated fixtures for updated glamour capture

Total: 434 tests across all 8 crates (harmonica: 24, lipgloss: 58,
bubbletea: 136, bubbles: 51, log: 30, glamour: 61, huh: 33, wish: 41)

All JSON fixtures validated.

Closes charmed_rust-5x5.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
